title: Create: Splendid Cogs
description: A Splendid Slimes addon that adds a Create inspired slime
body:
This **[Splendid Slimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/splendid-slimes)** addon adds a new slime inspired on **[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)** that can help farming resources, the Mechanic Slime!

# Mechanic Slime:
**Diet:** Loves to eat Andesite, but also likes all the other types of stone and raw ores

**Behavior:**
The Mechanic can hold items for you, that can be taken back by killing or spliting it

**Plorts:** Their Plort can turn into andesite alloy, brass or rose quartz, making it a great way to farm those

**How to get:** You can get Mechanic Slime Hearts by mixing Any Slime Heart with an andesite alloy with some heat below it

![A screenshot of the Mechanic Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a42cbcb7e93a402286ba3a74cc12495f29f84b81_0.webp)

### Dependencies:
To use this addon, you'll need to have [Splendid Slimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/splendid-slimes) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) installed (obviously).

### Support:
If you have any suggestions or need any support with the addon, you can leave a comment or contact me directly through [my Discord](https://discord.com/users/lucasflin)! :D
